nasb.text: Has this thing been done by my lord the king, and you have not shown to your servants who should sit on the throne of my lord the king after him?”

esv.text: Has this thing been brought about by my lord the king and you have not told your servants who should sit on the throne of my lord the king after him?”

cnv.text: 我主我王是不是作了這事，而你沒有告訴你的眾臣僕，誰要接續我主我王，坐你的王位呢？”

ccb.text: 这是我主我王的旨意吗？王还没有对臣仆们说过谁继承王位。”
